title: Easy Saute Croatian Zucchini Pasta
description: A fresh and snappy post-workout Croatian dish featuring parmigiano-reggiano, perfect for a quick and satisfying meal.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced zucchini to the skillet and saute for 3-4 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet with the zucchini and garlic.
Toss the pasta and zucchini mixture with the grated parmigiano-reggiano cheese.
Season the pasta with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
